title: Review workflow: evidence to human-gated fix plan

system.name: Agent-owned review workflow
system.description: Trusted orchestration of full agent sessions and durable task artifacts. The operator and human gate stay outside the C4 v1 container boundary.

containers.name: Trusted workflow
containers.description: Validates status, starts both review lanes, joins both results, and routes publication. Blocked status exits early.

containers.name: Full agent sessions
containers.description: Resolve the target, review changes and context in parallel, adjudicate both results, and publish evidence. No direct LLM calls.

containers.name: Persisted artifacts
containers.description: Stores task.md, immutable review.md, human-editable all-pending fix-plan.md, journal.ndjson, and result.json. Source writes stay forbidden.
